message:
test: add cross-module integration test for tuning → backpressure → scan

Chains TuningConfig (operator-tunable constants), BackpressureManager
(tier classification from queue depths), and ScanPipeline (chunked output
processing with tuning-derived buffer limits). 6 tests covering tuning
validation, invalid config error detection, backpressure-driven buffer
sizing, full pipeline flow under escalating load, batch vs chunked metric
consistency, and backpressure snapshot coherence with tuning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
